SEARCH
Package tage.shapes

Class ManualPyramid

java.lang.Object
tage.ObjShape
tage.shapes.ManualObject
tage.shapes.ManualPyramid
public class ManualPyramid extends ManualObject
ManualPyramid is a manually-defined pyramid mesh (square base + 4 triangular sides). It is centered at the origin with its base on the Y=0 plane and apex at Y=1.

Uses indexed source vertices but expands to a triangle-list stream using set*Indexed(), following the same pattern as ManualQuad.

Author:
Givin Yang, Nicole Joshua Espinoza

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ManualPyramid()
    Constructs a pyramid mesh and initializes positions, texture coordinates, normals, and material properties.

  • Constructor Details

    • ManualPyramid

      public ManualPyramid()
      Constructs a pyramid mesh and initializes positions, texture coordinates, normals, and material properties.

      The pyramid is built as 6 triangles (4 sides + 2 for the base). Vertices are duplicated per face so each face can use a flat normal and consistent UV mapping.
